commands.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git status --short --branch; rg --files | rg '("'^|/)(Demo/index'"\\.html|README\\.md|SKILL\\.md|.*PRD.*|.*[Tt]est.*|.*[Ss]moke.*|package\\.json)"'$'"' | sed -n '1,240p'; rg -n \"eac-demo-hardening|EAC B2B|Demo/index.html|export|PDF|tutorial\" SKILL.md skills_manifest.json README.md docs examples 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,240p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "git status --short --branch; rg --files | rg '("'^|/)(Demo/index'"\\.html|README\\.md|SKILL\\.md|.*PRD.*|.*[Tt]est.*|.*[Ss]moke.*|package\\.json)"'$'"' | sed -n '1,240p'; rg -n \"eac-demo-hardening|EAC B2B|Demo/index.html|export|PDF|tutorial\" SKILL.md skills_manifest.json README.md docs examples 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,240p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,220p' SKILL.md; sed -n '760,805p' skills_manifest.json; rg -n -C 8 \"离线演示|教程回退|伪装导出成功|EAC B2B Site Auditor|EAC tutorial fallback|export hardening\" evals test-prompts.json docs examples scripts 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,320p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,220p' SKILL.md; sed -n '760,805p' skills_manifest.json; rg -n -C 8 \"离线演示|教程回退|伪装导出成功|EAC B2B Site Auditor|EAC tutorial fallback|export hardening\" evals test-prompts.json docs examples scripts 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,320p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open(\"evals/capability-output-quality.json\")); print(\"\\n\".join(json.dumps(x, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) for x in d if \"eac\" in str(x).lower() or \"离线演示\" in str(x)))' 2>/dev/null || sed -n '1,180p' evals/capability-output-quality.json; find . -path '*/Demo/index.html' -o -iname '*prd*' -o -iname '*eac*' | sed -n '1,160p'"
